pages.text: A small commercial district — a lantern-lit plaza ringed by shops, each with its own villager. The mid-tier village island: one throw, several trades.

$(bold)The shops$()$(br)Each cabin comes with a $(item)job-site block$() and a bed, so its villager takes up that trade and settles in — farmer, librarian, fisherman, fletcher, toolsmith, and more. Which shops you get is the luck of the throw.

$(bold)Assembled by jigsaw$()$(br)The plaza and its shops are pieced together like a real village, so no two trade posts share a layout. Costs planks, cobblestone, and $(item)3 emeralds$() — bring a mountain's worth of mining.
